title: Static optimization gives wrong result (1 + NULL = -127)
poc: select a + b from (select 1, null) q(a, b);
key_bug_features: Static optimization with NULL in arithmetic operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 1), (2, NULL);
SELECT id, value + NULL AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT a + b FROM (SELECT 1 AS a, NULL AS b) AS subquery;
SELECT COALESCE(value, 0) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
